series_metadata.series_description: Form used to record information on investment accounts, such as account number, issue date, description, interest rate, maturity date, transaction amount and current balance; also, interest payment, principal additions/redemptions and pay-in numbers. Serves as supporting documentation for each individual investment account.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: paper two fiscal years fiscal year in which investment activity summary schedule was created unless audited by Auditor of State. If audited by Auditor of State, paper investment activity summary schedule audit report is released and any discrepancies are resolved. ; Paper: Paper should be retained two fiscal years fiscal year in which Summary Schedule was created
